title: Wedding of Wicket Wystri Warrick and Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Event |prev= |conc= |next= |image= |name=Wedding of Wicket Wystri Warrick and Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka |conflict= |date= |place=[[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] |outcome= |keyparties= |participants=[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa Kintaka]] }} {{Quote|Today I hold the spear held by Chirpa and our esteemed ancestral leaders. And today, I take a wife, the lovely Kneesaa.»''
''«Today I take the hand of Wicket, my handsome husband. Today I listen to the wisdom of the trees who guided us to love and live in their shade.|translated=1|An excerpt of the wedding vows|[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]}} The '''Wedding of [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]]''' took place sometime after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], shortly after the death of [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]]. The ceremony doubled as [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa's]] induction as the new chief of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. ==Behind the scenes== In [[1995]], ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' hinted that Wicket would replace Chirpa as chief of Bright Tree Village.''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]] But the [[2001]] [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] indicated that Kneesaa became the new ruler (as it was originally implied she would be in [[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Ewoks'' (1985) 2]]).''[[Ewoks (1985) 2 ''Ewoks'' (1985) 2[[ However, Wicket's [[Memory bank/Legends|databank]] entry confirms that the couple co-ruled the village together, although it does not specify if Wicket was inducted at the same time as Kneesaa.{{DB|character|wicketwwarrick|Warrick, Wicket W.}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *{{DB|character|wicketwwarrick|Warrick, Wicket W.}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Wicket Wystri Warrick and Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka, Wedding of}} [[Category:Ewok culture]] [[Category:Weddings]]
